title: ことわざ・慣用表現
fullTitle: 第26章　ことわざ・慣用表現

problems.question:
(a) "She finally decided to study English after she started working."
(b) "Better (　　) than never."
problems.ja:
(a) 「彼女は働き始めてからようやく英語を勉強しようと決心した」
(b) 「遅くても何もしないよりはましだ」〈ことわざ〉

problems.question: A bird (two / the hand / in / is / worth) in the bush.
problems.rawAnswer: (A bird) in the hand is worth two (in the bush.)
problems.ja: 明日の百より今日の五十。〈ことわざ〉
problems.answer: in the hand is worth two
problems.en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.

problems.question:
継続は力なり。
(　　) makes perfect.
A friend (is / indeed / friend / need / a / in).
problems.rawAnswer: (A friend) in need is a friend indeed (.)
problems.ja: まさかのときの友こそ真の友。〈ことわざ〉
problems.answer: in need is a friend indeed
problems.en: A friend in need is a friend indeed.

problems.question:
早起きは三文の得。
The early bird catches the (w　　).
problems.en: The early bird catches the worm.

problems.question:
１日１個のりんごを食べれば医者知らず。
An apple a day keeps the doctor (　　).
problems.ja: １日１個のりんごを食べれば医者知らず。
problems.en: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.

problems.question: According to the proverb, blood is (　　) than water.
problems.ja: ことわざによれば，血は水よりも濃い。
problems.en: According to the proverb, blood is thicker than water.

problems.question: I can finish this project in no time. It's <u>a piece of cake</u>.
problems.ja: このプロジェクトはあっという間に終えることができる。朝飯前だ。
problems.en: I can finish this project in no time. It's a piece of cake.

problems.question: He is <u>a pain in the neck</u>.
problems.ja: 彼は面倒くさい人物だ。
problems.en: He is a pain in the neck.

problems.question: Rumor (　　) the head teacher is going to leave our school.
problems.ja: うわさでは校長が学校を辞めることになったらしい。
problems.en: Rumor has it that the head teacher is going to leave our school.

problems.question: I'm sorry, but I didn't mean it. It was just a slip of the (　　).
problems.ja: ごめんなさい，でもそんなつもりではなかった。つい口が滑ってしまっただけだ。
problems.en: I'm sorry, but I didn't mean it. It was just a slip of the tongue.

problems.question:
子供たちはその本をとても面白がり，先生が朗読する間，熱心に耳を傾けました。
The children were very interested in the book and they (while, read, the, ears, teacher, were, it, all).
problems.rawAnswer: (The children were very interested in the book and they) were all ears while the teacher read it.
problems.ja: 子供たちはその本をとても面白がり，先生が朗読する間，熱心に耳を傾けました。
problems.answer: (The children were very interested in the book and they) were all ears while the teacher read it.
problems.en: (The children were very interested in the book and they) were all ears while the teacher read it.

problems.question:
今日はもう仕事を切り上げませんか。
Why don't we call it a (　　)?
problems.ja: 今日はもう仕事を切り上げませんか。
problems.en: Why don't we call it a day?

problems.question: (　　) to think of it, I haven't had a vacation in almost two years!
problems.ja: 考えてみると，私はほぼ２年間休暇がない！
problems.en: Come to think of it, I haven't had a vacation in almost two years!

problems.question: (　　) what may, I will never give up.
problems.ja: どんなことがあっても，私は決してあきらめない。
problems.en: Come what may, I will never give up.

problems.question: <u>The chances are</u> that they'll be late as usual.
problems.ja: 彼らはいつものように遅れる可能性が高い。
problems.en: The chances are that they'll be late as usual.
